1.Name: Solid Foundation
1.Description:
Consumes 10 HP to attack with a Wooden Stick.
If the attack hits a Stalker, restores 20 HP.
Killing a Stalker fully restores HP.
Cannot be used when HP is insufficient.
The actual damage is calculated based on the Armor of the object the Stalker has transformed into.
"A true master cares not for the quality of their weapon."

2.Name: Morning Mist's Guidance
2.Description:
This weapon will be available in a future version.

Consumes 10 HP to attack with Fafala's Sword.
If the attack hits a Stalker, restores 20 HP.
Killing a Stalker fully restores HP.
Cannot be used when HP is insufficient.
The actual damage is calculated based on the Armor of the object the Stalker has transformed into.
Weapon Special Effect: Nearby Shadow Hunters continuously restore HP and gain increased movement speed.
"I hope this brings you some peace..."

3.Name: Mourner's Blade
3.Description:
This weapon will be available in a future version.

Consumes 10 HP to attack with Denvel's Greatsword.
If the attack hits a Stalker, restores 20 HP.
Killing a Stalker fully restores HP.
Cannot be used when HP is insufficient.
The actual damage is calculated based on the Armor of the object the Stalker has transformed into.
Weapon Special Effect: Fires 2 additional blades of energy and clears all non-player objects within range.
"With this, I purge the sorrows of the past."

4.Name: Gold Rush Dream
4.Description:
This weapon will be available in a future version.

Consumes 10 HP to attack with a Pickaxe.
If the attack hits a Stalker, restores 20 HP.
Killing a Stalker fully restores HP.
Cannot be used when HP is insufficient.
The actual damage is calculated based on the Armor of the object the Stalker has transformed into.
Weapon Special Effect: Grants a random piece of ore on attack:
40% chance to obtain Amber: Reduces all skill CDs by 0.5s;
40% chance to obtain Benitoite: Restores 10 HP;
19% chance to obtain Dragon Crystal: Fires 5 energy blades in all directions;
1% chance to obtain Fulgurite: Lightning strikes all Stalkers within 30m.
"Do I have to dig too?"

5.Name: Forbidden Pinnacle
5.Description:
This weapon will be available in a future version.

Consumes 10 HP to attack with a Light Stick.
If the attack hits a Stalker, restores 20 HP.
Killing a Stalker fully restores HP.
Cannot be used when HP is insufficient.
The actual damage is calculated based on the Armor of the object the Stalker has transformed into.
Weapon Special Effect: Using any skill accumulates Dance Power. At 50 Dance Power, grants the Dance Off skill:
Upon use, fully restores HP and makes a random nearby Stalker the Spotlight.
"Please, stop fighting..."
